title: Command Packaging, Build Identity, Cross-Platform Behavior, and Distribution · Goroutine Forensics
summary: A preserved Go Pokedex run contains one plausible command, parsing, URL, JSON, client, cache, ownership, goroutine, cancellation, persistence, security, test, packaging, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in reproducible cross-platform Go Pokedex artifact and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Keep cmd entrypoint thin, internal packages directional, fixtures separate, and runtime paths independent of source checkout.
Expose semantic version, revision, build time policy, Go version, platform, and dirty-state evidence without making builds unnecessarily nondeterministic.
Test path, newline, signal, terminal, rename, permission, and architecture assumptions on supported platforms and document differences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Pokedex Go Command Package La…
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 1825 during a race-instrumented cache stress case. Build deterministic Go evidence to bind reviewed source to cross-platform builds, inspected archives, checksums, and installed smoke behavior; no user-visible meaning may rely on color or cursor motion; then inject one cache, waiter, goroutine, cancellation, or queue schedule and retain ownership evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep cmd entrypoint thin, internal packages directional, fixtures separate, and runtime paths independent of source checkout.

steps.instruction:
